  CREATION PART → fill when opening the card
  EVALUATION PART → fill at review time, one block per reviewer

## CREATION PART

### Objective

<!-- What does this feature do and why does it exist? One clear paragraph. -->

> [!NOTE]
> <!-- Important context: division of responsibilities, constraints, scope boundaries -->

---

### Checklist

<!-- Break the work down. Nest sub-tasks with indentation. -->

- [ ] Task 1
  - [ ] Sub-task
- [ ] Task 2
- [ ] Task 3

---

### Edge Cases

<!--
List cases that could break this and how each is handled.
Format: case → how it's caught / handled
-->

---

### Architecture

<!--
Classes, members, methods. Use code blocks for signatures.
-->

```

```

---

### Strategy

<!--
Explain the *why* behind design choices.
Use <details> for long explanations so the card stays readable.
-->

<details>
<summary>Design choice: <!-- title --></summary>

## EVALUATION PART

> *Filled by reviewers — do not edit before your review turn*

### Checklist

- [ ] no leaks
- [ ] edge cases covered
- [ ] tests pass

---

<!-- Copy-paste the block below for each reviewer -->

### Review — `reviewer`

**Questions**
<!-- Questions that came up while reviewing -->

**Suggestions**
<!-- Improvements or alternatives worth considering -->

**Changes**
<!-- Any changes made during review -->

**Final Feedback**
<!-- Overall assessment -->

**Status**

- [ ] Validated as is
- [ ] Validated with changes
- [ ] Not validated — new PR: #
